I want to hear about the issues that are important to you.

Book your slot!

If you have an issue that needs resolving, or just want to meet me and say hello, get in touch! Myself and my team of caseworkers will do everything we can to help you.

Thank you for your response. ✨

Please note that my surgery appointments can fill up quickly. If there are no remaining appointments available on your desired date, new surgeries are being arranged every month, so please check regularly for new dates and locations.
